task: ACQUIRE cistern (наливная) reference quote to validate ТР-1 2026 own-cistern schemes N19-N24 (per-TONNE)

result.reason: Every free online РЖД cistern calculator located is gated behind registration/login (subscriber-only), captcha, or is a manager call-back form rather than an instant compute. The session's shared Playwright browser was held continuously by sibling agents, so JS/bot-protected calculators (alta.ru) could not be driven. No fabricated value is returned — this computes real money.

unitNote: Own/leased cisterns charge PER TONNE (за тонну), schemes N19-N24 by tariff class of the liquid cargo — fundamentally different unit from полувагон, which charges PER WAGON (за вагон, scheme N8). A cistern reference quote must be captured as ₽/тонна (and total = perTonne × netTons), NOT ₽/вагон. Confirmed against repo tr1-scheme-classifier-extended.json: п.21.1 'наливные в цистернах — собственные по схемам N19-24 (за тонну, по классу)'. Empty own cistern return: N26 (сжиж.газ тара>7.5т/ось) else N25.
engineGap: Rate-belts (distance×class numeric поля) for N19-N24 are NOT seeded in the repo (per uncertainNotes in tr1-scheme-classifier-extended.json: 'Для схем N9-13, N19-24, N30-31 ... числовые пояса дальности НЕ seeded → расчёт рублей для этих вагонов сегодня невозможен без доскрейпа Приложения N2'). A ruble-level reference quote is required to validate once those belts are scraped.

calculatorsEvaluated.name: NGE.RU — Расчет ж/д тарифа
calculatorsEvaluated.fit: BEST FIT — calculator is explicitly cistern-only: page states 'Расчет производится только для перевозки в цистернах и крытых вагонах грузов ЕТСНГ позиций групп 20, 21, 22, 43-48'. Tariff per Прейскурант 10-01.

formFields.sv: checkbox value=1 → Собственный вагон (OWN cistern supported)
formFields.hidden: nge_nds=20, lit_nds=0, bel_nds=0; addsum_unit rt='за тонну' / rv='за вагон'

calculatorsEvaluated.blocker: GATED: form fields are all disabled='disabled'; page states 'Расчет только для абонентов NGE.RU' with links to login (/rrtarif.htm?auth=true) and registration (reg.htm). Compute requires a subscriber account — cannot create one. Page encoding is Windows-1251.
calculatorsEvaluated.caveat: Uses Прейскурант 10-01 (legacy tariff base), NOT ТР-1 2026. Still validates per-tonne cistern STRUCTURE/scheme + own-wagon mechanics, but rubles would need re-indexing to 2026.

calculatorsEvaluated.name: ГРУЗ и ВАГОН (gruzivagon.info)
calculatorsEvaluated.fit: Claims all wagon types incl. собственный; CIS coverage.

calculatorsEvaluated.name: Альта-Софт ЖД Тариф Онлайн (alta.ru)
calculatorsEvaluated.fit: Public free calculator; HTML mentions Собственный (own wagon). JS single-page app.
calculatorsEvaluated.blocker: Bot-protected: curl over non-browser UA returns redirect loop (HTTP exit 47). Requires a real browser to drive; the session's shared Playwright instance was locked by sibling agents for the entire task window.

calculatorsEvaluated.name: metallplace.ru/Rail
calculatorsEvaluated.blocker: Rail tariff is part of a PAID analytics subscription (rdn tariff/auth/order endpoints); captcha on auth/subscription forms. No free instant compute.

calculatorsEvaluated.name: ГК Глобал Логистик (glogist.ru)
calculatorsEvaluated.blocker: captcha-heavy; form is a /form/callback callback request (manager call-back), not an instant compute.

calculatorsEvaluated.name: ДИККОМ (dikkom.com)
calculatorsEvaluated.blocker: Form posts to a contact/quote endpoint (manager call-back), not an instant per-tonne compute.

recommendation: Capture the cistern reference through one of the operator's OWN authenticated channels: (1) R-Тариф Онлайн — operator already has access (see reference-quotes.json RTARIFF-Elisenvaara-Elista note) and it produces a per-tonne + per-wagon breakdown for ANY route on demand; this is the cleanest ТР-1 2026 source. (2) NGE.RU under the operator's subscriber login — best for нефтепродукт cistern routes specifically, but legacy 10-01 base. Suggested concrete route to request: дизельное топливо (ЕТСНГ group 21), собственная цистерна, ~1000 km domestic, class of cargo per ЕТСНГ; record ₽/тонна без НДС, total = ₽/тонна × нетто-тонн, the scheme number (N19-N24), distance, and НДС status.

sources.what: NGE.RU cistern-only РЖД tariff calculator (form structure, cargo groups, own-wagon support, subscriber gate)
repo scheme classifier confirming N19-24 per-tonne + unseeded rate-belts
